# Gherkin UI Specifications — Dashboard, Holdings, Registrars, Price History
# Generated by: Gherkin Spec Agent
# Source: HO-008 + AT-002 + User feedback 2026-05-08
# Decisions locked: inline editing, value-default chart, predefined registrar fields
# Uncle Bob rule: Tests RED before production code GREEN

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FEATURE FILE 7 — Dashboard Page
# File: features/dashboard_ui.feature
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Feature: Dashboard page behaviour
  As a portfolio owner
  I want the Dashboard to show a consolidated read-only view
  So that I can assess my portfolio status at a glance each morning

  Background:
    Given I am authenticated as an admin user
    And I am on the /dashboard page

  # ── Edit Mode ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-001 Edit mode toggle is not visible on Dashboard
    Then the edit mode toggle is not present in the navbar
    And the navbar shows the theme toggle and bell icon only on the right side

  Scenario: SC-UI-002 Edit mode toggle is visible on Holdings page but not Dashboard
    When I navigate to /holdings
    Then the edit mode toggle is present in the navbar
    When I navigate to /dashboard
    Then the edit mode toggle is not present in the navbar

  # ── Theme Toggle ───────────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-003 Theme toggle switches from light to dark mode
    Given the current theme is light
    When I click the theme toggle icon
    Then the html element has class "dark"
    And the moon icon is replaced by a sun icon
    And localStorage key "epm-theme" equals "dark"

  Scenario: SC-UI-004 Theme toggle returns to system theme from dark
    Given the current theme is dark (manually forced)
    When I click the theme toggle icon
    Then the html element does not have class "dark"
    And localStorage key "epm-theme" equals "system"

  Scenario: SC-UI-005 Theme persists after page reload
    Given I have forced the dark theme
    When I reload the page
    Then the html element still has class "dark"
    And no flash of light theme occurs before dark is applied

  # ── Notification Bell ──────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-006 Bell icon shows count badge when action items exist
    Given 3 action items are pending (draft holdings, stale prices, etc.)
    Then the bell icon displays a badge showing "3"
    And the badge is amber coloured

  Scenario: SC-UI-007 Clicking bell opens dropdown with last 5 notifications
    Given action items exist
    When I click the bell icon
    Then a dropdown panel appears below the bell
    And the panel shows at most 5 notification items
    And each item is clickable and navigates to the relevant page
    And clicking outside the dropdown closes it

  Scenario: SC-UI-008 Bell badge disappears when no action items exist
    Given no pending action items exist
    Then the bell icon has no badge
    And the bell icon is not highlighted

  # ── Sector Allocation ──────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-009 Sector allocation donut shows current month data
    Given holdings exist across multiple sectors
    When the dashboard loads
    Then the sector allocation donut chart renders with one segment per sector
    And each segment label shows the sector name and percentage
    And the chart total in the donut centre matches total_portfolio_value

  Scenario: SC-UI-010 Sector allocation reflects actual holding values not counts
    Given Banking holdings total "₦4,500,000" and Consumer holdings total "₦2,000,000"
    When the dashboard loads
    Then Banking segment is larger than Consumer segment
    And percentages are computed from value not number of stocks

  # ── Top Holdings Chart ─────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-011 Top holdings chart defaults to By Value view
    When the dashboard loads
    Then the top holdings chart shows a horizontal bar chart
    And the bars represent current_value in ₦
    And the active toggle button is labelled "By Value"

  Scenario: SC-UI-012 Switching to By Number of Shares changes chart data
    Given the top holdings chart is showing By Value
    When I click the "By Shares" toggle button
    Then the chart bars represent num_shares not current_value
    And the active toggle button is now labelled "By Shares"
    And the "By Value" button becomes inactive

  Scenario: SC-UI-013 Top holdings chart shows at most 10 holdings
    Given 15 holdings exist
    When the dashboard loads
    Then the top holdings chart shows exactly 10 bars
    And they are the 10 holdings with the highest current_value

  # ── Recent Transactions ────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-014 Recent transactions shows current date ticker type shares amount
    Given live transactions exist
    When the dashboard loads
    Then the recent transactions card shows columns:
      | Column  | Format                    |
      | Date    | current date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
      | Ticker  | DM Mono uppercase         |
      | Type    | coloured badge            |
      | Shares  | current num_shares        |
      | Amount  | ₦ formatted string        |
    And only live (not draft) transactions are shown
    And at most 5 rows are shown

  Scenario: SC-UI-015 Recent transactions empty state renders correctly
    Given no live transactions exist
    Then the recent transactions card shows "No transactions recorded yet"
    And no table rows are rendered

  # ── Action Items ───────────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-016 Action items card shows draft holdings alert
    Given 2 holdings have status "draft"
    Then the action items card shows "2 holdings pending publish"
    And clicking the alert navigates to /holdings

  Scenario: SC-UI-017 Action items card shows stale price alert
    Given the last price update was more than 7 days ago
    Then the action items card shows a price staleness warning
    And clicking the alert navigates to /settings/price-entry

  Scenario: SC-UI-018 Action items card shows all-clear when nothing is pending
    Given no draft holdings and no stale prices and no pending claims
    Then the action items card shows a green checkmark
    And the text reads "Portfolio up to date"

  Scenario: SC-UI-019 Action items card shows pending claim alert
    Given a claim record has status "approved" and actual_payout is null
    Then the action items card shows "1 claim approved — collect payout"
    And clicking the alert navigates to /registrars

---

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FEATURE FILE 8 — Holdings Page
# File: features/holdings_ui.feature
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Feature: Holdings page CRUD and display
  As a portfolio owner
  I want to view, add, and edit my holdings inline
  So that I can maintain accurate records without leaving the page

  Background:
    Given I am authenticated as an admin user
    And I am on the /holdings page

  # ── Column Phases ──────────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-020 All required columns visible in view mode
    Given live holdings exist
    Then the holdings table shows these columns:
      | Ticker | Company | Sector | Shares | Avg Cost |
      | Curr Price | Curr Value | Cost Basis | return[%] | Div Yield |
      | Status | Actions |
    And the return[%] column header is exactly the string "return[%]"

  Scenario: SC-UI-021 Curr Value, Cost Basis, return[%] and Div Yield are computed columns
    Given a holding with 100 shares at avg cost "400.00" and current price "450.00"
    Then curr_value shows "45,000.00"
    And cost_basis shows "40,000.00"
    And return[%] shows "+12.50%"
    And div_yield is computed from annual dividend per share divided by current price

  Scenario: SC-UI-022 Actions column shows Edit and Delete in edit mode only
    Given edit mode is OFF
    Then the Actions column buttons are not visible
    When edit mode is turned ON
    Then each live holding row shows an Edit icon and a Delete icon
    And each draft holding row shows an Edit icon, Publish button, and Delete icon

  # ── Inline Editing ─────────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-023 Clicking Edit on a holding row enables inline editing for that row
    Given edit mode is ON
    And a live holding exists for DANGCEM
    When I click the Edit icon on the DANGCEM row
    Then the DANGCEM row enters edit mode
    And editable fields appear inline: Shares, Avg Cost, Status
    And a Save button and Cancel button appear on that row
    And all other rows remain in read-only view mode

  Scenario: SC-UI-024 Saving inline edit persists changes
    Given the DANGCEM row is in inline edit mode
    When I change Shares to "150" and click Save
    Then PATCH /api/v1/holdings/{id} is called with num_shares 150
    And the DANGCEM row returns to read-only view with updated values
    And the dashboard KPIs update to reflect the new holding value

  Scenario: SC-UI-025 Cancelling inline edit discards changes
    Given the DANGCEM row is in inline edit mode
    When I change Shares to "999" and click Cancel
    Then the DANGCEM row returns to read-only with original values
    And no API call is made

  Scenario: SC-UI-026 Inline edit validates shares must be positive
    Given the DANGCEM row is in inline edit mode
    When I change Shares to "-10" and click Save
    Then a validation error appears on that row: "Shares must be greater than zero"
    And no API call is made

  # ── Add Holding ────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-027 Clicking Add Holding inserts inline form row at top of table
    Given edit mode is ON
    When I click the [+ Add Holding] button
    Then a new empty inline form row appears at the top of the holdings table
    And the row contains input fields: Company (searchable), Shares, Avg Cost, Status
    And a Save and Cancel button appear on the new row

  Scenario: SC-UI-028 Saving new holding creates it as draft by default
    Given the inline add form is open with Company ZENITHBANK, Shares 100, Avg Cost "32.00"
    When I click Save on the new row
    Then POST /api/v1/holdings is called with status "draft"
    And the new row appears in the table with a DRAFT badge
    And the dashboard Holdings KPI shows the updated draft count

  Scenario: SC-UI-029 Add Holding rejects duplicate company
    Given a holding already exists for DANGCEM
    When I try to add another holding for DANGCEM
    Then a validation error appears: "A holding for DANGCEM already exists"
    And no API call is made

  # ── Draft / Live / Delete ──────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-030 Publish button on draft row changes status to live
    Given a draft holding exists for GTCO in edit mode
    When I click the Publish button on the GTCO row
    Then PUT /api/v1/holdings/{id}/publish is called
    And the GTCO row changes from DRAFT badge to LIVE badge
    And the dashboard portfolio value updates to include GTCO

  Scenario: SC-UI-031 Delete shows confirmation before soft-deleting
    Given edit mode is ON and a live holding exists for SEPLAT
    When I click the Delete icon on the SEPLAT row
    Then a confirmation dialog appears: "Remove SEPLAT from your holdings?"
    When I confirm
    Then DELETE /api/v1/holdings/{id} is called
    And the SEPLAT row disappears from the table

---

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FEATURE FILE 9 — Registrars Page
# File: features/registrars_ui.feature
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Feature: Registrar management with company linking and extended fields
  As a portfolio owner
  I want to manage registrars with multiple contact fields
  So that I can track all contact methods and linked companies accurately

  Background:
    Given I am authenticated as an admin user
    And I am on the /registrars page
    And edit mode is ON

  # ── Company Linking Fix ────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-032 Linking a company to a registrar succeeds with 200
    Given registrar "First Registrars" with id 13 is selected
    And company "ZENITHBANK" with id 115 exists in the database
    When I select ZENITHBANK from the company dropdown and click [Link Company]
    Then POST /api/v1/registrars/13/companies/115 returns 200
    And ZENITHBANK appears in the Linked Companies card for First Registrars
    And the company count badge on the left panel increments by 1

  Scenario: SC-UI-033 Unlinking a company removes it from the registrar
    Given ZENITHBANK is already linked to First Registrars
    When I click the unlink icon next to ZENITHBANK
    Then DELETE /api/v1/registrars/13/companies/115 is called
    And ZENITHBANK is removed from the Linked Companies card
    And the company count badge decrements by 1

  # ── Extended Contact Fields ────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-034 Edit Registrar modal shows predefined field type options
    When I click [Edit Registrar] for First Registrars
    Then the Edit Registrar modal opens
    And the modal shows existing fields: name, email, phone, address
    And a [+ Add Field] button is visible
    When I click [+ Add Field]
    Then a field type selector appears with options:
      | phone | email | address | website | other |

  Scenario: SC-UI-035 Adding a second phone field stores it correctly
    Given the Edit Registrar modal is open
    When I click [+ Add Field] and select "phone"
    Then a new phone input row appears below the existing phone field
    When I enter "0802-555-0199" in the new phone field and click Save
    Then the registrar record stores both phone numbers
    And both phone numbers are visible in the registrar detail panel

  Scenario: SC-UI-036 Adding a website field to a registrar
    Given the Edit Registrar modal is open
    When I click [+ Add Field] and select "website"
    And I enter "https://firstregistrars.com.ng"
    And I click Save
    Then the registrar detail panel shows the website field
    And clicking the website opens it in a new browser tab

  Scenario: SC-UI-037 Add Registrar modal has the same extended field capability
    When I click [+ Add Registrar]
    Then the Add Registrar modal opens
    And the modal includes name, email, phone, address fields
    And a [+ Add Field] button is present for adding extra fields
    And the modal has a [Save] and [Cancel] button

  # ── Delete Registrar ───────────────────────────────────────────

  Scenario: SC-UI-038 Delete registrar button is visible next to Edit button
    Given a registrar is selected in the left panel
    Then a [Delete] button is visible alongside the [Edit Registrar] button
    And the Delete button is styled in red/danger colour

  Scenario: SC-UI-039 Deleting a registrar requires confirmation
    When I click the [Delete] button for First Registrars
    Then a confirmation dialog appears:
      "Delete First Registrars? This will also remove all linked requirements and documents."
    When I confirm
    Then DELETE /api/v1/registrars/13 is called
    And First Registrars is removed from the left panel list

  Scenario: SC-UI-040 Deleting a registrar with linked companies warns user
    Given First Registrars has 5 linked companies
    When I click [Delete] for First Registrars
    Then the confirmation dialog includes: "5 companies will be unlinked"

---

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FEATURE FILE 10 — Price History Page
# File: features/price_history_ui.feature
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Feature: Price history page
  As a portfolio owner
  I want to see a complete history of price changes per company
  So that I can track price movements and verify NGX PDF uploads

  Background:
    Given I am authenticated as an admin user
    And I am on the /price-history page

  Scenario: SC-UI-041 Price history page shows a company selector
    Then a searchable company dropdown is visible
    And the placeholder reads "Select a company to view price history"

  Scenario: SC-UI-042 Selecting a company loads its price history chart
    When I select DANGCEM from the company dropdown
    Then a line chart renders showing DANGCEM price history
    And the X-axis shows dates and the Y-axis shows ₦ prices
    And the chart uses accent-lavender (#BCBDFA) as the line colour

  Scenario: SC-UI-043 Price history table shows date, price, and source
    Given DANGCEM has price history records
    When I select DANGCEM
    Then a table below the chart shows:
      | Date       | Price (₦) | Source         |
      | 2026-05-08 | 450.00    | ngx_pdf_upload |
      | 2026-05-07 | 445.00    | manual         |
    And source values are shown as coloured badges

  Scenario: SC-UI-044 Price history respects date range filter
    Given DANGCEM has 90 days of price records
    When I select the "30D" filter button
    Then only the last 30 days of records are shown in the chart and table

  Scenario: SC-UI-045 Price history empty state when company has no history
    Given NEWCO has no price_history records
    When I select NEWCO
    Then the chart area shows: "No price history for NEWCO yet"
    And the table shows the empty state message

  Scenario: SC-UI-046 Price history page accessible by readonly user
    Given I am authenticated as a readonly user
    When I navigate to /price-history
    Then the page loads without error
    And the company dropdown and chart are visible
    And no edit controls are present

---

# SC-UI-014  Dashboard  recent transactions columns       → test_recent_tx_columns

# SC-UI-016  Dashboard  action items draft alert          → test_action_items_draft_alert
# SC-UI-017  Dashboard  action items stale price alert    → test_action_items_stale_price
# SC-UI-018  Dashboard  action items all clear            → test_action_items_all_clear
# SC-UI-019  Dashboard  action items claim approved alert → test_action_items_claim_alert
# SC-UI-020  Holdings   all columns visible               → test_holdings_columns_visible
# SC-UI-021  Holdings   computed column values            → test_holdings_computed_columns
# SC-UI-022  Holdings   actions column edit mode only     → test_holdings_actions_edit_mode
# SC-UI-023  Holdings   inline edit activates per row     → test_holdings_inline_edit_row
# SC-UI-024  Holdings   save inline edit persists         → test_holdings_inline_save
# SC-UI-025  Holdings   cancel discards changes           → test_holdings_inline_cancel
# SC-UI-026  Holdings   validate shares positive          → test_holdings_validate_shares
# SC-UI-027  Holdings   add holding inline row            → test_add_holding_inline_row
# SC-UI-028  Holdings   add holding defaults draft        → test_add_holding_defaults_draft
# SC-UI-029  Holdings   add holding rejects duplicate     → test_add_holding_duplicate
# SC-UI-030  Holdings   publish draft holding             → test_holdings_publish_draft
# SC-UI-031  Holdings   delete with confirmation          → test_holdings_delete_confirm

# SC-UI-035  Registrars add second phone                  → test_registrar_add_phone
# SC-UI-036  Registrars add website field                 → test_registrar_add_website

# SC-UI-040  Registrars delete warns about linked cos     → test_registrar_delete_linked_warning
# SC-UI-041  PriceHist  company selector visible          → test_price_history_selector
# SC-UI-042  PriceHist  selecting company loads chart     → test_price_history_chart_loads
# SC-UI-043  PriceHist  table shows date price source     → test_price_history_table_cols
# SC-UI-044  PriceHist  date range filter works           → test_price_history_date_filter
# SC-UI-045  PriceHist  empty state renders               → test_price_history_empty_state
# SC-UI-046  PriceHist  readonly user can access          → test_price_history_readonly_access

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# IMPLEMENTATION DECISIONS LOCKED FOR ANTIGRAVITY
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#
# DASHBOARD:
#   Edit mode toggle: hidden via route-level check in _app.dashboard.tsx
#   Bell dropdown: TanStack Query useActionItems() drives count + list
#   Notification items: derive from existing data (drafts, stale prices,
#     approved claims) — no new notifications table needed
#   Top Holdings toggle: uiStore.holdingsChartView = 'value' | 'shares'
#   Recent Transactions: existing useRecentTransactions() hook, 5 rows max
#
# HOLDINGS:
#   Inline edit: row-level editingRowId state (null = none editing)
#   Add Holding: editingRowId = 'new' triggers empty inline row at top
#   PATCH endpoint: already built in HO-008 — wire frontend to it
#   Duplicate check: frontend validates before API call using useCompanies()
#
# REGISTRARS:
#   405 fix: already deployed in HO-008 — verify in AT
#   Extended fields schema: add registrar_contact_fields table:
#     (id, registrar_id, field_type, field_value, sort_order, deleted_at)
#     field_type: ENUM('phone','email','address','website','other')
#   API: GET /api/v1/registrars includes contact_fields array
#   PUT /api/v1/registrars/{id} accepts contact_fields array (replace all)
#
# PRICE HISTORY:
#   Build simultaneously with Holdings and Dashboard (per user request)
#   Uses existing price_history table and GET /api/v1/prices/history/{id}
#   Date range filter: ?days=30|90|180|365|all
#   Chart: Recharts LineChart, stroke #BCBDFA, area fill 15% opacity
#
# ACCEPTANCE TEST FORMAT (per user request):
#   Tests grouped by page/view with clear headings
#   Each test: numbered SC-UI-XXX, plain English result
#   Format mirrors the draft AT submitted in HO-008 feedback
